testimonials.title: Ce Que Disent Nos Clients
testimonials.subtitle: Vrais avis de nos clients satisfaits

review1.text: Ali, is very professional, friendly and reliable. He and his brother are amazing and do not over charge or scam in any way. I recommend them for all your plumbing needs.
review1.author: E Prab

review2.text: Had a great experience with them. All came right on time on a saturday morning, and he quickly fixed 3-4 problems in my apartment unit such as fixing a sliding mirror door, re-installing a door and a few other minor problems. Will highly recommend them.
review2.author: Sogl Nasab

review3.text: I was so fortunate to come across and use Blue Men Plumbing. They were prompt, efficient and did great work. Their quote and final price was lower than I expected. Anyone needing a professional plumber for a small or an extensive large job; they are who to call and you won't be disappointed.
review3.author: Michael Masse
